title: Riblah #7247
definition:
Riblah = "fertility"

 1) a place on the eastern boundary of Israel
 2) a town in the land of Hamath on the great road between Babylon and
    Palestine
nasbUsage:
Definition: Riblah = "fertility"

 1) a place on the eastern boundary of Israel
 2) a town in the land of Hamath on the great road between Babylon and
    Palestine

    NASB:  a city in Hamath, also one on N.E. border of Isr.
